title: secretx-keyring: implement OS keychain backend
description: Implement SecretStore for the OS keychain via the keyring crate. URI: secretx://keyring/<service>/<account>. Covers macOS Keychain, Linux Secret Service (GNOME Keyring / KWallet), and Windows Credential Manager. get() calls Entry::get_password. put() calls Entry::set_password. refresh() re-reads from keychain. Development and desktop use only; not suitable for server deployments. Dep: secretx-core, keyring crate.
